description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front features a covered porch with steps leading up to a wide entrance, flanked by large glass doors or windows. The exterior walls are primarily white, with dark trim and accents, and the structure sits on a tiled platform that extends around the building. On one side, there is a lush tree with purple foliage, partially obscuring the porch and adding a natural element to the otherwise geometric design. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. A red bicycle is visible near the side, suggesting a residential, family-friendly environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white walls, dark trim, a covered porch, and a tree with purple foliage on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, wide entrance, steps, and a tree with purple foliage partially obscuring the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white brick wall, horizontal windows, and the tree extending along the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white wall with no visible windows or doors, and the tree just visible on the left edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a dark wall, a single window, the tiled platform, and a red bicycle near the tree.
